assertions.assertion: Adds Duende.Storage.Sqlite NuGet package (or references it)
assertions.rationale: Response uses Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Sqlite, not the Duende.Storage.Sqlite package.

assertions.assertion: Calls AddUserManagement() on the IdentityServer builder with a configuration lambda
assertions.rationale: Response uses AddAspNetIdentity<IdentityUser>() instead of AddUserManagement().

assertions.assertion: Calls AddSqliteStore() inside the AddUserManagement options lambda (not at top level)
assertions.rationale: No AddSqliteStore() call anywhere; uses EF Core DbContext pattern instead.

assertions.assertion: Calls IDatabaseSchema.CreateIfNotExistsAsync() to ensure database schema exists
assertions.rationale: Uses EF Core migrations instead of IDatabaseSchema.CreateIfNotExistsAsync().
